name: cafe_cats
title: ねこカフェ繁盛記
style: cute warm cozy 3D animated movie style, soft cinematic lighting, expressive cartoon cats, consistent character design

mike.desc: Mike, a small light-grey tabby kitten with big round blue eyes and fluffy fur, wearing a blue cafe apron

tencho.desc: Tencho, a large muscular black cat with a scar over his left eye and a stern face, wearing a white dress shirt and a black vest

scenes.title: ねこカフェ繁盛記
scenes.narration: ようこそ、ねこカフェへ。
scenes.image: a cozy warm cat cafe interior, wooden counter, hanging plants, gentle afternoon light

scenes.narration: いらっしゃいませ！……あっ、コーヒーこぼしちゃった！
scenes.image: behind the cafe counter, panicking, a knocked-over cup of coffee spilling, flustered teary expression
standing tall with arms crossed, glaring with an intimidating expression, dim dramatic lighting

scenes.narration: ひっ……ご、ごめんなさいっ！
scenes.image: cowering and trembling, tearful scared eyes, looking very small

scenes.narration: ……ったく。ほら、新しいの淹れ直せ。手伝ってやる。
scenes.image: gently patting the kitten's head with a soft kind smile, warm golden lighting

scenes.narration: こわい店長は、ほんとは、優しい。
scenes.image: the kitten and the big black cat smiling together side by side in the cozy cafe, warm happy atmosphere
